ddls:
CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement procedure */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the procurement procedure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the procurement procedure */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the procedure (e.g., open, closed, awarded) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the procurement procedure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the procurement procedure */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer responsible for the procedure */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the procurement procedure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the procurement (e.g., IT, construction, services) */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria used to evaluate tenders */,
  "contract_awarded_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was awarded */,
  "contract_awarded_to" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier to whom the contract was awarded */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Final contract value */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status with regulations and standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenders" (
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tender */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement procedure the tender is for */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier submitting the tender */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the tender was submitted */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount quoted by the supplier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tender (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "technical_score" REAL /* Technical score given to the tender */,
  "financial_score" REAL /* Financial score given to the tender */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score combining technical and financial scores */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the evaluation process */,
  "contract_awarded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tender was awarded the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenders_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests_to_participate" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request to participate */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement procedure the request is for */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier requesting to participate */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reason_for_request" TEXT /* Reason why the supplier is requesting to participate */,
  "additional_documents" TEXT /* Links or references to any additional documents submitted */,
  "approval_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the approval process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_to_participate_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_to_participate_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_information" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of additional information */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement procedure the information is for */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Type of additional information (e.g., clarification, amendment) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the information was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the information was last updated */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the additional document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the information */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the information */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the information has been approved */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_information_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_information_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the buyer belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the buyer (e.g., procurement officer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the buyer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position title of the buyer */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the buyer (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyers_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the supplier belongs to */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the supplier company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the relevant field */,
  "past_performance" TEXT /* Past performance ratings or scores */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications or accreditations */,
  "contact_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organisation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organisation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the organization operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the organization was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement procedure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the procedure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)
